text: Welcome to the community, @helper_alex! Your moderator application has been approved. We're excited to have you help keep our community friendly and safe.
Welcome to the community, @guide_sam! Your event helper application has been approved. We can't wait to work with you on our upcoming community events.
Welcome to the community, @newbie_kim! Your member application has been approved. Feel free to introduce yourself in the introduction channel and get to know other members!
Welcome to the community, @mentor_lina! Your mentor application has been approved. We're thrilled to have you share your knowledge and experience with our newer members.
